title: rubus lanatellus
intro: Rubus lanatellus, also known as the bramble, is a type of thorny shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus lanatellus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus lanatellus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
